Van Gogh.color: warm golden yellows and deep cobalt blues
Van Gogh.texture: swirling thick impasto brushstrokes, visible canvas
Van Gogh.description: A textured post-impressionist portrait inspired by Van Gogh.

Anime.texture: clean flat coloring with sharp highlight speculars
Anime.description: A clean anime portrait with sharp cel-shaded colors.

Neon.color: electric magenta and cyan on near-black background
Neon.lighting: glowing rim light and light-trail highlights on facial contours
Neon.description: A futuristic neon-lit cyberpunk face style.

Pop Art.color: bold flat primary colors (red, yellow, cyan) with high contrast black outlines
Pop Art.description: A retro pop art portrait with bold colors and graphic textures.

Graffiti.color: vibrant spray-paint palette (orange, purple, teal) with drip effects, bold black outline strokes
Graffiti.texture: spray-can texture and stencil edges, brick wall undertone
Graffiti.description: A street-art graffiti style with vivid spray-paint textures.

Watercolor.texture: watercolor washes and drips on textured paper
Watercolor.description: A soft watercolor portrait with flowing washes and texture.

Pencil Sketch.texture: fine cross-hatching and pencil strokes on paper
Pencil Sketch.description: A realistic pencil sketch portrait with strong graphite shading.

Cyberpunk.texture: high tech metallic and synthetic textures
Cyberpunk.description: A cinematic cyberpunk style with glowing urban color accents.

3D Cartoon.description: A polished 3D cartoon-style portrait with smooth shading.

Oil Painting.texture: traditional canvas and oil paint strokes
Oil Painting.description: A classical oil painting portrait with rich tonal shading.
